zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Montague於1180年出生在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古時，她的父親William de Montague21歲，母親Isabel of Somerset19歲。她於1199年與William Montacute在英國英格蘭薩默塞特塞頓 蒙迪斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1226年在英國英格蘭戴文莫德波利享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: Montague
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

variants.name: McTigue
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Taidhg, ‘son of Tadhg’, a personal name originally meaning ‘poet’ or ‘philosopher’. Compare McCaig .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Montague was born in 1180, in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England, her father, William de Montague, was 21 and her mother, Isabel of Somerset, was 19. She married William Montacute in 1199, in Sutton Montis, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1226, in Modbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

Elle est décédée en 1226, à Modbury, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Montague(이)가 1180년 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 몽아구에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Montague(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel of Somerset(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1199년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 수턴 몽이스에서 William Montacute(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1226년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 모드버이에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Montague родилась в 1180 г. в местности шептон монтагу, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Montague было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel of Somerset, 19.
